failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one valid matching item priced at $46.13 and incorrectly answered that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle costs more than $45.76. The tool returned one matching item: item_id 1096508426 with price 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor had this relevant tool output available but produced the opposite conclusion: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the wrong answer.
